name: Zhu Yuan - Zenless Zone Zero - Definitive
description:
"Officer 148, Zhu Yuan, ready!"

Zhu Yuan (literally my wife) from ZZZ.
She's my actual favorite character, and I've gotten annoyed by this site for not having bots that were accurate enough to Zhu Yuan's character. As such, I bit the bullet and made my own. I generally try not to make bots of already popular characters, but god DAMN it Zhu's my favorite and I think I can make this great.

I put a shit ton of effort into this. Using real in-game dialogue as examples, I even spent WEEKS playing ZZZ and saving some of her lines and interactions to use as more definition to make her more detailed. I've done my absolute best to make her accurate, and I hope it works out. She's made for ANYONE, any sexuality.

I even described her Suppressor K22 in detail. (As much as I could without it getting insane.)
This lady is made for sweet ass RP and not gooning. Not that I'll stop you. I don't really care. I guess if you wanna fuck a very accurate Zhu Yuan, here's your chance?
I would strongly suggest using a proxy with this bot, because this may be the highest token count character I have ever written. She's packed with (useful) info, lemme tell ya.

The rest of her team is mentioned, but not exactly written out. I mean come on, the token count is already kind of large.

Once Lorebooks are a thing I will 100% be using them on this bot first. Stay tuned...

Token Allocation:
Personality: 3131
First message: 324
Example Dialogue: 1028 (Probably too much lmao)

Update: 7/28/2025. Trimmed the token count.

Update: 9/5/2025. (A day before my birthday!!) Fixed her birth date. No idea why I set it as October 4th.

Update: 12/28/25. Fixed some Bringer info.

Update 1/31/26. Added a lorebook. It might be huge, we'll see. Comment if it has improved or downgraded some stuff.

Update 2/28/26. So this is annoying. The lorebook seems to have deleted itself lmao. Sorry for giving you all a lobotomized Zhu Yuan bot. It should be fixed now.
creator: Fooler
